demoPage.summary: Enter a birthday to render the localized personality result with the published dantalion packages.
demoPage.title: Dantalion birthday personality demo

personalityForm.emptyStateBody: Pick a birthday inside the supported range and submit to render the localized personality result.
personalityForm.invalidRangeMessage: Please pick a date between 1873-02-01 and 2050-12-31.
personalityForm.nicknameHelp: Used only inside this tab to personalize the result heading.

items: Calculation and localized copy ship as separate packages so the CLI, web demo, and your own apps can reuse the same core.
Pure ESM modules targeting Node `^22.22.2 || >=24`, ready to bundle for modern browsers.
Ships TypeScript declarations alongside the runtime artifacts.
Available as both an installable CLI (`@kurone-kito/dantalion-cli`) and an embeddable library (`@kurone-kito/dantalion-core`).
feature.title: Library highlights

hero.subtitle: Powered by the open-source dantalion library.

install.subtitle: Install the published dantalion packages on the `next` dist-tag for the modernized `v1.0.0-rc.x` line.
install.title: Install

preface.intro: “Dantalion” is the seventy-first demon in [the Lesser Key of Solomon](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Lesser_Key_of_Solomon). He teaches every kind of academic knowledge but also reads and steers the will of others.
preface.purpose: This site is a thin browser demo of `@kurone-kito/dantalion-core` and `@kurone-kito/dantalion-i18n`. Pick a birthday and the libraries compute the personality details client-side, then localize the rendered narrative in your language.

privacy.body: Your birthday is processed entirely in this browser tab. Nothing is sent to a server or persisted off-device on its own.
privacy.shareNote: Heads up: today the Share, Copy link, and X / Bluesky entries embed your birthday in the URL they hand off. Only use them with people you would tell your birthday to in person. A privacy-preserving share path is on the roadmap as v1.1.1.
privacy.title: Privacy

repo.subtitle: Open the source, file issues, or read the documentation.

result.fileIdHint: A stable identifier for this personality. Click to open the detail page or use the copy button to share the ID.

geniusAxes.title: Three personalities
geniusAxes.subtitle: Each axis surfaces under different conditions — Inner is the baseline; Outer comes out when you do not trust the room; Work style shows under focus or urgency.

share.hookTemplate: I am personality {{genius}} on the dantalion demo.

geniusPage.summary: Explore the full localized profile for this genius type.

notFoundPage.body: The page you requested is not part of this static demo build.
notFoundPage.title: Page not found
